note: Adds the contest module: operator-created contests/duels paid in tUSDC. create (operator picks 1v1 or multi, level band, entry), fund (anyone tops up the pool), join (real entrant pays entry), join_as_house (CoordinatorCap-gated free filler, never wins), settle (CoordinatorCap names the winner, pool pays out, house skipped). Upgrades stay SUI with fees pooling in the Treasury. Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) reused unchanged.

supersedes.reason: Added the contest module for the tUSDC contest/duel economy.
